sourceLimitations: The official ParlIran host timed out or did not resolve from this environment during generation.
The roster is generated from the current public 12th-term list and kept in TOR Phi as a refreshable local archive.
Records pages preserve official Majlis, IPU, ICANA, and Majlis Research Center source paths for later official import.

sourceRegistry.label: Islamic Consultative Assembly official website
sourceRegistry.note: Official parliamentary website. It was retained as the first official source, but the host was unreachable from this environment during generation.

sourceRegistry.label: IPU Parline Iran parliament profile
sourceRegistry.note: Inter-Parliamentary Union profile that links the official parliament and member-list source paths.

sourceRegistry.label: ICANA / Khaneh Mellat
sourceRegistry.note: Official parliament news service used as the record-search layer for member mentions, attendance reports, voting-participation reports, and parliamentary statements.

sourceRegistry.label: Public 12th-term roster
sourceRegistry.note: Public machine-readable roster used to seed all member profiles when the official ParlIran site was unreachable.
